purpose: Reduce operator cognition load while preserving governance evidence, replay visibility, continuity semantics, lineage visibility, and authority boundaries.
design_principle: Compress first. Inspect second. Never erase evidence.

semantic_clarification_rules.HASH_VERIFIED: artifact integrity only; not semantic correctness, truth, quality, safety, approval, or execution readiness
semantic_clarification_rules.CERTIFIED_FOR_CONTINUITY_INGESTION: continuity-ingestion readiness only; not approval, dispatchability, execution authorization, semantic authority, or autonomous continuation
semantic_clarification_rules.CONTINUITY_VALID: continuity evidence visible and internally valid for review; not execution authorization, provider dispatch, approval, or next-step authorization
semantic_clarification_rules.REPLAY_VISIBLE: replay evidence visible; session-local unless a durable replay backend milestone explicitly exists

operator_meaning: replay is not a ledger write

authority_compression.first_level_statement: SEMANTIC_TRANSPORT_ONLY: no approval, no dispatch, no execution, no provider call, no orchestration, no autonomous continuation.
authority_compression.detailed_evidence_location: expandable authority evidence below compact statement
authority_compression.goal: reduce repeated authority labels without weakening authority boundaries

review_targets: authority labels are clearer, not weaker
governance_clarity_improvements: clearer separation between integrity, certification, continuity, replay, and authority
one primary authority statement before expanded evidence
remaining_risks: compact states may hide nuance if implemented without expandable evidence
session-local replay requires persistent labeling until durable replay exists
too much compression could weaken constitutional visibility
recommended_next_step: Implement a sidepanel-only UX simplification pass that adds the executive governance layer and evidence hierarchy without removing raw artifact inspection or changing runtime behavior.
